description: baseline
Uint8Array lookup table for base64 decode (replaces indexOf)
buffer-based encode with Uint8Array (slower due to reduce + buffer overhead)
eliminate tuple alloc in decodeVLQ + charCodeAt in decode loop
VLQ cache with Map for -255..255 (Map lookup overhead too high)
VLQ encode cache using flat Array for -255..255
inline decodeVLQ into decode() to eliminate function call overhead
inline encodeVLQ into encode() to eliminate function call overhead
fast-path single-char VLQ decode (digit < 32)
encode per-line strings with join (huge regression on single-line cases)
widen VLQ encode cache to -1023..1023
Uint8Array buffer encode (String.fromCharCode conversion too slow)
unify separator detection via B64_DECODE table (encode regressed)
single concat per segment (slower than individual +=)
comma-prefixed VLQ cache eliminates separate comma concat
2-char VLQ decode fast path (too much code bloat for JIT)
de-inline VLQ decode to helper function (decode regressed 72->86ms)
remove unused vlqValue/vlqPos module-level variables
pre-size lines array by counting semicolons (scan overhead > array growth savings)
encode with string[] parts and join (array push far slower than V8 cons-string +=)
batch 4-5 VLQ cache lookups into single concat (added branching hurts JIT)
branchless VLQ sign extension via XOR trick
VLQ_SINGLE direct charCode-to-delta lookup (marginal, added complexity for ~2ms)
